market_overview.headline: Market showing broad deterioration with SPY in Bull Breakdown, QQQ bearish unstacked, and BTC in full bear territory down 19% from 21W EMA.
market_overview.detail: Only 28% of stocks in bullish signals vs 48% bearish, with 45 stocks experiencing bull breakdowns. BTC's full bear structure (-19% vs 21W) signals risk-off environment spreading across asset classes.

reversal_candidates.headline: Bear Rally Reversal Candidates (With Bullish Crossover Alerts)

items.name: NVIDIA Corporation
items.crossover_detail: 8W just below 13W (0.09%) — bullish cross potential; 13W just above 21W (0.99%) — bearish cross risk
items.note: AI leader showing first signs of stabilization with 8W EMA approaching bullish cross of 13W EMA.

items.name: Apple Inc.
items.crossover_detail: 8W just below 13W (0.10%) — bullish cross potential; 13W just above 21W (0.98%) — bearish cross risk
items.note: Mega-cap showing potential EMA realignment with 8W EMA within striking distance of 13W crossover.

items.name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
items.crossover_detail: 8W just below 13W (0.50%) — bullish cross potential; 13W just below 21W (0.82%) — bullish cross potential
items.note: Social media giant with both 8W→13W and 13W→21W crossovers imminent, suggesting potential trend reversal.

items.name: Amazon.com, Inc.
items.note: E-commerce leader showing 13W EMA approaching bullish cross of 21W despite full bear structure.

items.name: JP Morgan Chase & Co.
items.crossover_detail: 8W just below 13W (0.85%) — bullish cross potential; 13W just above 21W (0.15%) — bearish cross risk
items.note: Banking giant with potential 8W→13W bullish cross while sector remains under pressure.

items.name: Western Digital Corporation
items.note: Memory/storage leader pulling back to 13W EMA while maintaining strong 22% gain vs 21W EMA.

items.name: Micron Technology, Inc.
items.note: Memory giant offering pullback entry with solid 21% cushion above 21W EMA in strong uptrend.

items.name: Caterpillar, Inc.
items.note: Industrial bellwether pulling back in orderly fashion with 10% buffer above key 21W support.

items.name: Freeport-McMoRan, Inc.
items.note: Copper play benefiting from infrastructure themes with healthy pullback structure intact.

momentum_themes.headline: Momentum Concentrated in Energy and Materials
momentum_themes.detail: Energy minerals and non-energy minerals sectors showing 100% bullish readings with strong momentum. Semiconductor equipment also accelerating with names like AMAT and GLW leading.

sector_analysis.headline: Commodity Sectors Dominate While Tech Services Crater

strongest.note: Perfect bullish score with all 9 stocks in uptrends averaging 14.5% above 21W EMA.
Mining and metals showing universal strength with significant pullback opportunities emerging.
Small but perfectly bullish sector with names like logistics benefiting from infrastructure spending.

weakest.note: Massive sector destruction with 91% bearish readings as AI bubble deflates and growth concerns mount.
Complete sector breakdown with all constituents in bearish structure.
Banking sector under pressure with 48% bearish as rate cycle concerns weigh on margins.

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth/tech into commodity and industrial sectors, with finance caught in the middle as rate sensitivity creates headwinds.

items.text: SPY showing bearish cross risk with 8W just above 13W (0.16%) while already in bull breakdown mode
Technology services sector in complete collapse with 91% bearish readings including mega-caps MSFT, META, AMZN
BTC full bear structure with -19% vs 21W EMA suggests continued risk-off sentiment across markets
45 bull breakdowns indicate broad deterioration in previously strong names across multiple sectors
